title: NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited:
NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
